failedAssertions.reason: Health check reports db:ok when the DB file is missing. Root cause: sqlite3.connect() in check_db_health() creates a new empty file when the path doesn't exist, and PRAGMA integrity_check passes on the empty database. The health check should verify the DB file exists before connecting, or run a schema-aware check (e.g., verify a known table exists) rather than just integrity_check on whatever file is found.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for API Endpoints and Browser UI surfaces with isolation rules and boundaries
No changes needed — service definitions were correct
